item.title: DTCC begins live tokenized-securities trading with JPMorgan, BlackRock, Goldman Sachs and 47 other firms in July pilot
MiCA regulation took full effect July 1, requiring all crypto firms serving EU customers to hold a license or cease operations
SEC plans to propose Regulation Crypto rule this month, creating safe harbor exemptions for digital asset issuers and developers
OCC granted Circle conditional national trust bank charter as GENIUS Act stablecoin rules deadline passed July 18
UK FCA published its final crypto regulatory framework, requiring digital asset firm authorization for UK market access
U.S. Senate Clarity Act advances with White House meeting planned to resolve ethics provisions; floor vote expected week of July 20
Crypto hacks totaled $1.3 billion in H1 2026; Q2 recorded 83 incidents, the most in any quarter, with North Korea linked to 66% of losses
SEC and CFTC signed a joint interpretation and MOU to coordinate crypto asset oversight and reduce duplicative regulatory burden
OCC, FDIC and FinCEN published proposed GENIUS Act rules requiring $5M capital floors, 1:1 reserves and two-day redemption for stablecoins
FATF Travel Rule activated in EU and Australia July 1; 85 of 117 jurisdictions now implementing VASP identity requirements
Visa settled stablecoin payments at a $3.5 billion annualized rate as major card networks expand on-chain crypto payment integration
U.S. Strategic Bitcoin Reserve remains in progress as federal agencies negotiate custody and asset management frameworks
Security researchers disclosed a vulnerability that put $70 billion in crypto assets at risk; the flaw was patched before any exploitation
Tether launched USAT, a U.S.-focused stablecoin engineered for GENIUS Act foreign-issuer compliance as Tether seeks Treasury reciprocity
